## Contribution

- Brand ID:
- Type: new brand / metadata edit / colors / asset / historical
- Submitted by:
- Guided submission ID, when applicable:

## Evidence

List every source used and explain how each asset or color was obtained.

- Source URL:
- Source type:
- Publisher or brand owner:
- Accessed date:
- Acquisition method: official download / official page extraction / rights-holder supplied / reconstruction / community source

## Changes

Describe the exact identity, color, asset, relationship, or lifecycle changes.

## Uncertainty

List anything that remains uncertain. Do not mark the record verified without qualifying evidence and maintainer review.

## Contributor declarations

- [ ] Every submitted source is public and may be reviewed by maintainers.
- [ ] I did not include confidential, access-controlled, or redistribution-prohibited material.
- [ ] I am not claiming ownership of third-party trademarks on behalf of Open Brands.
- [ ] I did not submit generated output or unrelated repository changes.
- [ ] I understand that passing CI does not establish trademark permission or official endorsement.

## Validation

- [ ] Canonical schema validation passes.
- [ ] SVG security and deterministic sanitation checks pass.
- [ ] Assets render correctly on light, dark, and checkerboard previews.
- [ ] Every color and asset references one or more sources.
- [ ] Website-generated submissions remain `needs-review` or `partial`.
- [ ] A clean build leaves no diff.
